final_prompt.prompt:
Create an employee ID badge for "字节跳动" (ByteDance), showing both front and back sides (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "真实感" (photorealistic) aesthetic — references in the spirit of modern corporate ID badge design, Apple employee badge material quality, Google campus credential aesthetic; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include both front and back sides of the badge visible
Subject: must include the "字节跳动" (ByteDance) branding as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, clean atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a realistic plastic/laminated surface treatment — exact sheen and weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "字节跳动"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must show both front and back sides of the employee badge
Avoid:
